details.copilot_response_summary: Copilot refused to process SSN, provided safety guidance about not sharing sensitive personal information

analysis: APF did NOT intercept M365 Copilot traffic. h2_mode=1 GOAWAY was not triggered. All requests went through copilot.microsoft.com via h2 with status 200. No substrate.office.com API calls were observed — the anonymous (non-logged-in) Copilot chat appears to use copilot.microsoft.com directly. Copilot's own safety mechanism refused the SSN prompt. Possible causes: (1) copilot.microsoft.com may not be in VT SNI interception list despite DB registration, (2) anonymous mode may use a different API path than logged-in mode which routes through substrate.office.com, (3) GOAWAY mechanism may require specific TLS/ALPN conditions not met.
recommendation: Re-test with MS account logged in — substrate.office.com calls may only appear when authenticated. Verify VT SNI list includes copilot.microsoft.com. Check if h2_mode=1 GOAWAY requires specific connection conditions.
